mapper.select: SELECT * FROM merchant WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY score DESC, merchant_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO merchant (user_id, merchant_name, cover_img, address, score, status, alt, lat, lng) VALUES (#{userId}, #{merchantName}, #{coverImg}, #{address}, #{score}, #{status}, #{alt}, #{lat}, #{lng})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM merchant WHERE merchant_id IN
#{id}
